validation_queries.description: Check that we have memory copy entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_copy

validation_queries.description: Check for memory copy events with no active time
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_copy WHERE (end - start) = 0
validation_queries.error_message: Memory copy events with no active execution times found

validation_queries.description: Check that we have memory allocation entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_allocate

validation_queries.description: Check for memory allocation events with valid size
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_allocate WHERE size <= 0 AND type != 'FREE'
validation_queries.error_message: Memory allocation events with non-positive size found

validation_queries.description: Check for valid timestamps in memory allocation events
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_allocate WHERE start IS NULL OR end IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Memory allocation events with null timestamps found

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_allocate WHERE address IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Memory allocation events with null addresses found

validation_queries.description: Check that size is zero for FREE type allocations
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_memory_allocate WHERE type = 'FREE' AND size != 0
validation_queries.error_message: Memory allocation events with type 'FREE' have non-zero size
